description: Style NoteBeautiful ethnic sets, intricately designed and with finesse in the finish, this will set of your outfit nicely and complete your ethnic ensembles. Product Detailsjewellery setnecklace: White pearl like beads with golden intercepts and a hook and eye closure at the back, a pendant with a white background and  golden case with pearl like danglers from itEarring: Golden coloured base with a white background and an intricately patterned design and pearl like bead danglers with push back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of the necklace: 34 cmLength of the earring: 28 mm
